name: disk_db_oltp
title: Database transactions
short_description: Mixed read and write transactions against a local database file.

structured_text.description: Runs a steady stream of small transactions against a local database file, mixing reads, inserts and updates while keeping the data durable on disk. This combines small random access with the flushing a real database performs to keep data safe, which is one of the most demanding everyday storage patterns.
structured_text.metric_explanation: The score is the number of database transactions committed per second, reported as operations per second.
structured_text.value_interpretation: Higher is better. More transactions per second means a database backed application stays responsive under load.
structured_text.reasoning: Durable transactional workloads push storage on small writes and flushing, which is the pattern that defines servers and database backed software.

domain_gaming.explanation: Games keep small local databases for state and progress.

domain_office.explanation: Many productivity apps store their data in local databases.

domain_software_development.explanation: Local development runs databases for testing and tooling all the time.

domain_graphics_design.explanation: Creative apps use small databases for catalogues and history.

domain_video_editing.explanation: Editors keep media catalogues in local databases.

domain_3d_rendering.explanation: Asset and job tracking use small databases around rendering.

domain_audio_production.explanation: Audio tools keep project and library databases on disk.

domain_cad_engineering.explanation: Engineering data management relies on transactional stores.

domain_scientific_computing.explanation: Experiment tracking and results often live in transactional databases.

domain_ai_training.explanation: Run tracking and metadata stores commit many small transactions.

domain_ai_inference.explanation: Serving systems log and look up state through transactional databases.

domain_data_science.explanation: Querying and updating local databases is a routine part of analysis.

domain_server_virt.explanation: Transactional database throughput is the defining storage workload for servers.
